completed_tasks.name: Tranche 1 — gitignore audit, ROADMAP dedupe, archive done phases/quicks, fix stale CLAUDE.md hook ref
Tranche 2 — consolidate user_data/ and cv-templates/ into backend/
Tranche 4 — backend/services/ regrouped into storage/voice/ai subpackages
Tranche 5 — frontend/src/hooks/ feature-coupling (useTailor → direct-edit, useVoiceInterview → voice-widget)

blockers.description: 16 template-rendering tests fail with 'No filter named html_latex' — pre-existing, Phase 13 in-flight work. Carried unchanged across all 5 tranches; never attributed to hygiene refactor.
blockers.workaround: n/a — refactor complete; this stays open against Phase 13.

human_actions_pending.action: Docker volume migration on existing deployments
human_actions_pending.context: Tranche 2 moved cv-maker-data mount target from /app/user_data to /app/backend/user_data. Documented in .planning/quick/260524-ws1-*/260524-ws1-SUMMARY.md. Local dev unaffected.

decisions.decision: Full move accepting breaking deployment change
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Full move, accept breaking' over symlink/compat-shim. Single atomic commit per tranche, no half-states.
User picked option 3: live alongside the code that owns it. backend/user_data/voice_profile.json was already stranded there.
Co-locate raw LaTeX cls/sty/font assets with the Jinja2 .tex.j2 templates that consume them. Dropped redundant Dockerfile COPY since backend/ already covers it.

decisions.decision: Plain mv for untracked content, git mv for tracked
decisions.rationale: git mv refused on empty/gitignored dirs (user_data/versions/* contents are gitignored runtime data). cv-templates/ tracked → git mv preserved cls/sty/tex/font/png history.
User explicit ask: '/gsd-quick per tranche'. Keep refactor steps reviewable as discrete units.
User chose 'Keep, leave alone' — graph viewer artifacts are useful, gitignored already.

decisions.decision: Tranche 5 caller-driven scope reduction — only 2 hooks moved
decisions.rationale: Original plan called for 4 hook moves (useTailor, useImport, useChat, useVoiceInterview). Caller verification overrode the spec: useChat is consumed by ToolsContext (cross-cutting, not direct-edit) and the rg match against useChangeHighlights was a comment string referencing useTailor.ts. useImport is also consumed by ToolsContext. Both stayed shared. useTailor moved to direct-edit (sole caller TunePanel) and useVoiceInterview moved to voice-widget (sole caller VoiceWidget; spec said cv-import, but cv-import is not a caller).

uncommitted_files: .mcp.json (pre-existing dirty, NOT tranche work — left unstaged through all 5 tranches)
.planning/STATE.md (pre-existing dirty, NOT tranche work — left unstaged through all 5 tranches)

The 19ef955 'wip: repo-hygiene paused at tranche 2 of 5' commit is left in branch history; rewriting would require force-push and is not worth the cost. Pre-existing dirty files (.mcp.json, .planning/STATE.md) remain unstaged.
